title: GoalOS Signoff Pro — Loop to RSI to ASI Superintelligence Console Lab v33
tagline: From proof-gated work to proof-gated invention to governed superintelligence readiness.
coreMessage: Blockchain proves the transaction. GoalOS proves the work.
ASI-scale systems require proof, gates, dossiers, councils, and rollback before promotion.
No Proof. No Trust. No Settlement. No ungoverned superintelligence.
sourceBasis: AGI Alpha RSI Sovereign v0 presentation: thesis to build the governance institution before AGI-scale systems mature.
AGI Alpha RSI Sovereign Strategy Brief: deterministic pipeline target → emit → filter → atlas → test-plan → eval → insert → promote.
GoalOS Signoff Pro public-safe proof-to-acceptance doctrine: proof before settlement, human authority, replayable receipts.
consoleCapabilities: button-driven AI-style console with no text input and no external model call
notClaims: Does not claim achieved AGI, ASI, superintelligence, or recursive self-improvement in production.
Does not authorize autonomous deployment, weapons use, surveillance, custody, settlement, or live payment.
Does not connect wallets, call external AI APIs, collect user input, store personal data, or move value.
Demonstrates a governance architecture and public-safe interactive console only.
